summary: Frontend-only testing of Shop page personalization features. All main UI features working correctly: pillar filters with subcategories, intelligent search dropdown, Load More pagination, Products/Services tabs. No product counts displayed (only prices). Pet sync feature could not be tested due to invalid test credentials.

minor.issue: Test credentials (testpicks@example.com/password) are invalid - returns 'Invalid email or password'

action_items: Provide valid test credentials for pet sync testing
Consider creating a test user with pets for automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage.jsx correctly implements petSelectionChanged event listener (lines 524-540)
No product counts displayed anywhere - only prices shown (requirement met)
Pillar filters with subcategories working correctly
Intelligent search dropdown shows product image, name, price, and 'Product' badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page UI features all working. Pet sync feature requires valid user credentials with pets to test. The petSelectionChanged custom event is implemented in both Navbar.jsx and ShopPage.jsx but could not be verified end-to-end due to invalid test credentials.

features_tested.shop_page_loads_without_counts: PASS - No product counts found, only prices displayed
features_tested.pillar_filters_visible_scrollable: PASS - 15 pillar buttons found, horizontally scrollable
features_tested.pillar_subcategories: PASS - Clicking Celebrate shows 5 subcategories (Cakes, Mini Cakes, Dognuts, Hampers, Party Treats)
features_tested.load_more_pagination: PASS - Initial 24 products, after Load More: 48 products
features_tested.intelligent_search_dropdown: PASS - Shows product image, name, price (₹), and 'Product' badge
features_tested.products_services_tabs: PASS - Both tabs clickable and switch views
